children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury is authorized to subscribe on behalf of the United States to, and make payment for, 150,000 additional shares of the capital stock of the Bank.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: Any subscription by the United States to the capital stock of the Bank shall be effective only to such extent and in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Limitations on authorization of appropriations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In order to pay for the increase in the United States subscription to the Bank under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $1,500,000,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.

children.label: A
children.text: $225,000,000 shall be for paid in shares of the Bank; and

children.label: B
children.text: $1,275,000,000 shall be for callable shares of the Bank.
